bilan.2_appel_bloquant_prouve: NOT definitively proven (the platform kill left exactly 1 log line and 0 application logs -- nothing to name the last call). The instrumentation added by this mission (Phase 3) guarantees any FUTURE timeout will name the exact last call started. The prime suspect (2718-id single-IN-clause SELECT, >60KB request URL) is eliminated regardless: it no longer exists in any form.
bilan.3_instrumentation: state/db-call-guard.ts -- one structured line per DB call: db_call_name, started_at, finished_at, duration_ms, row_count, chunk_index, remaining_budget_ms_before/after, status, timeout, aborted. Shape-checked by test to contain NO other field (no secret/URL/snippet/payload possible).
bilan.4_appels_audites: 15 call sites inventoried in docs/OPENSERP_SERVERLESS_DB_CALL_AUDIT.md (lease acquire/release, query-state load/upsert/seed, engine-state load/upsert, 9 writer calls) -- all previously unbounded
bilan.5_appels_timeoutes: 15/15 now routed through withDbTimeout; structural test (openserp-db-call-guard.test.ts) counts supabase .from()/.rpc() call sites vs .abortSignal(signal) chains per file and fails on any mismatch
bilan.6_mecanisme_abort: postgrest-js's native .abortSignal(AbortSignal) on every builder and RPC -- real network cancellation, explicitly NOT Promise.race (unit test proves the signal genuinely fires inside the call)
bilan.7_timeout_db_max: MAX_DB_CALL_TIMEOUT_MS = 8000ms, shrunk per-call to min(8000, remaining_budget - 500ms reserve), floor 1000ms
bilan.8_minimum_budget_db: MIN_VIABLE_DB_BUDGET_MS = 2000ms -- below this the call is refused up front (time_budget_exhausted_before_db_call), never started
bilan.9_hydrate_avant: 1 SELECT with ALL 2718 query_ids in a single IN clause (URL >60KB), plus a full-universe seedMissingQueryStates on the hot path; no timeout, no chunking, no budget awareness
bilan.10_hydrate_apres: loads ONLY mutated rows (WHERE last_executed_at IS NOT NULL, paged x1000, each page bounded+budget-checked); absent row == default seeded row by construction, so parity is EXACT (proven by test, byte-identical hydration output); hot-path seeding removed entirely (checkpoint upsert creates missing rows anyway)
bilan.11_chunk_size: DB_IN_CLAUSE_CHUNK_SIZE = 200 ids for remaining IN-clause loads (checkpoint reads, seed script); EXECUTED_STATES_PAGE_SIZE = 1000 rows for the executed-rows pager
bilan.12_rows_chargees: 2718 -> 10 at the benchmark's realistic post-few-runs state (0 on a fresh universe)
bilan.13_temps_avant_apres: 171ms -> 4ms total hydration (PGlite-local timings; ratio is the meaningful figure), max single call 17ms -> 4ms
bilan.14_gate_a: PASS -- 7/7: instant DB, 1s-slow DB (completes), hanging DB (really aborted, DbCallTimeoutError, 0 partial state), budget refused before first SELECT, slow release (bounded + best-effort swallow), parity, 120s simulation
bilan.15_gate_b: PASS -- 2718 real rows seeded, old vs new hydration measured, no single call anywhere near the 8s cap (data/audits/openserp-db-timeout-gate-b-benchmark.json)
bilan.17_test_db_lente: PASS -- 1s-per-call DB completes normally; 60s-hanging DB is aborted at the budget-derived timeout with zero partial rotation state
bilan.18_simulation_120s: PASS -- 6s per DB call + 20s per engine call on the budget clock: pipeline stops voluntarily (time_budget_exhausted), partial checkpoints persisted exactly, control returned well inside the 120s window
bilan.19_platform_timeout: 0 in every simulated scenario (no code path can now await an unbounded call: engines bounded since the prior mission, DB bounded by this one)
bilan.21_build: PASS (route manifest complete; the type-check step passed -- note: two background build attempts were externally killed mid-typecheck [Windows worker exit 0xC0000142], a local-environment flake unrelated to the code; the foreground run completed cleanly)

22_preview.endpoint_authenticated_flags_off: not re-executed with the Preview secret (its value was deliberately destroyed after the earlier mission's test); the flag gate code is byte-identical to what returned NOOP_FLAGS_DISABLED on this same Preview env earlier this session

bilan.23_production_modifiee: NO -- no deployment, no migration, no flag change, no write. The only Production contact was the read-only 34-query parity check.
bilan.24_head_final: 99bc877 (see git log; this report committed on top)
bilan.26_prochaine_mission: OPENSERP-SERVERLESS-STATE-REAL-RUN-VALIDATION-3 -- requires its own explicit authorization; its headline criterion: no network call, engine or Supabase, can single-handedly exceed the internal budget. Not started.
